title: Potion+
description: Introduces several new potions to the game, each offering unique effects and gameplay possibilities!
body:
Introduces several new potions to the game, each offering unique effects and gameplay possibilities.




Here is the list of potions:


Potion of Decay (Effect: Wither) (Recipe: Awkward Potion + Soul Sand)

Potion of Decay II (Effect: Wither II) (Recipe: Potion of Decay + Glowstone Dust)

Potion of Defence (Effect: Resistence) (Recipe: Thick Potion + Iron Ingot)

Potion of Frenzy (Effect: Strength III + Nausea II) (Recipe: Long Strength Potion + Fermented Spider Eye)

Potion of Grind (Effect: Haste II + Hunger II) (Recipe: Awkward Potion + Golden Pickaxe)

Potion of Corruption (Effect: Strength IIII + Wither) (Recipe: Potion of Decay + Ghast Tear)

Potion of Endurance (Effect: Slowness IIII + Absorption II) (Recipe: Mundane Potion + Honeycomb)

Potion of Blazing Gamble (Effect: Fire Resistance + Luck IIIII + Mining Fatigue II) (Effect: Fire Resistance Potion + Nether Quartz)







Just Enough Items (JEI) is recommended so you can find recipes in-game!
